modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues adding course materials to the USD Online Bookstore.

full_description_text: 
I'm trying to add books or materials for my courses but I can't figure it out. The site is in read-only mode, so I can't do anything. Also, I need to know how to get a course registration on the online bookstore. It's really confusing and I need help.
short_description: Issues adding course materials to the USD Online Bookstore.
